_comment: Maps roadmap.json titles (often abbreviated or paraphrased) to the exact titles stored in the Question collection. Loaded by auditRoadmap.js before fuzzy matching — if a roadmap title matches a key here, the alias is looked up in the Question collection with an exact (case-insensitive) match. Keys must be lowercase, values must be the canonical LeetCode title. Do NOT add fuzzy logic here; this is a pure lookup table.
remove nth node from the end of list: Remove Nth Node From End of List
maximum sum subarray of size k: Maximum Size Subarray Sum Equals k
number of subarrays having average great: Number of Sub-arrays of Size K and Average Greater than or Equal to Threshold
find missing numbers: Find All Numbers Disappeared in an Array
shortest time: time needed to inform all: Time Needed to Inform All Employees
minimum time to arrive on time: Minimum Speed to Arrive on Time
kth largest element: Kth Largest Element in an Array
reverse odd levels: Reverse Odd Levels of Binary Tree
construct bt from preorder and inorder: Construct Binary Tree from Preorder and Inorder Traversal
construct bt from postorder and inorder: Construct Binary Tree from Inorder and Postorder Traversal
construct bst from preorder: Construct Binary Search Tree from Preorder Traversal
insufficient nodes in root to leaf: Insufficient Nodes in Root to Leaf Paths
lca of binary tree: Lowest Common Ancestor of a Binary Tree
lca of deepest leaves: Lowest Common Ancestor of Deepest Leaves
lca of bst: Lowest Common Ancestor of a Binary Search Tree
